productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Printed Yellow Tshirts
description: CompositionLight yellow round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed round neckline, short sleeves and distressed look print on the front FittingRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm ironDo not iron directly on print/embroideryBold and stylish, this light yellow t-shirt from united colors of benetton is perfect for casual wear. The distressed look image of a DJ's hands working on his system gives this tee an edgy vibe, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans and canvas shoes for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.11", Shoulders-18.5"
